content.en:
The Void Ancient Realm is in the void.

A Supreme True Ancestor appeared, but lost track of his enemies.

"Damn, I can't find it!"

Yakumo Dao Ancestor said angrily.

His dignified and powerful Dao Ancestor tracked down a Supreme True Ancestor, and he even tracked it down?

He admitted that the Supreme True Ancestor was very remarkable, but he was far from growing up, and he could still escape from him and so many Supreme Dao Ancestors, and he didn't even see his back.

At this time.

One by one, the Supreme Dao Ancestors felt that their faces were not bright, and they were all very angry.

They need to pay a price for being born this time, and now they haven't snatched the Forbidden Mother Stone, which is a big loss.

If it was taken away by other Supreme Dao Ancestors, it would only be a pity, but if it was taken away by a True Ancestor, it would be a slap in the face and a shame.

"Who is this person?"

A Supreme Dao Ancestor asked.

"Is it the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor?" someone asked again.

"It's not the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor was watching with the Nine Extremes Heavenly General just now, the two of them should also be Supreme True Ancestors, but they didn't make a move, and they are not qualified to make a move! The strength of the Supreme True Ancestor who made a move is just like that, but the means of escaping and the means of concealing the aura are too terrifying, the other party has also mastered the Forbidden Dao, and the Supreme True Ancestor has mastered the Forbidden Dao, which is too strange!"

The Wind King spoke.

When he said this, he also wanted to exclude Ye Tian, he knew that the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor and the Nine Extremes Heavenly General were the same person, in case others suspected Ye Tian of doing it, it would not be a good thing.

Of course, the other Supreme Dao Ancestors were not stupid, and they wouldn't really think that Ye Tian did it.

"Could it be a reincarnated person!" Yayun Dao Ancestor spoke: "If it is the reincarnation of a strong person, then it is not difficult for the Supreme True Ancestor to master the forbidden path. Or, the other party is a supreme heavenly pride cultivated by the Heavenly Emperor Palace, then it is also possible!"

"That's right, it must be the reincarnation of the Invincible True Ancestor, or the reincarnation of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, otherwise the Supreme True Ancestor would not have such an anti-heaven existence!"

Many Supreme Dao Ancestors have found a suitable reason, after all, a person who is a half-step domain ancestor or an invincible true ancestor level reincarnation, once he reaches the combat power of the Supreme True Ancestor, it is normal to have such means.

In this way, they are not ashamed.

The Forbidden Mother Stone was gone, and there was no need for their group of supreme Dao Ancestors to fight, and they turned around and left one by one.

They have been born for a short time, and their strength is slowly declining, if they delay any longer, under the suppression of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, they may not be lightly injured, and even their strength will drop to a certain extent, and they may even be killed by the Supreme True Ancestor.

Therefore, in the case of no benefit, they only want to go back immediately and continue to sleep and seal themselves.

Yayun Dao Ancestor hurriedly returned to Tianhai Sect with Shenhai Dao Ancestor and Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor, at this time, after Shenhai Dao Ancestor and Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor performed the forbidden technique, the injuries began to erupt, and the breath was declining, and it was falling very fast.

"Soon, it's going to be Tianhai Sect!"

Yakumo Dao Ancestor muttered.

Shenhai Dao Ancestor and Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor also breathed a sigh of relief, at this time, their aura had dropped to a realm that was only equivalent to the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and they were about to fall to the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

But it doesn't matter, once they return to the Sleeping Land, without the suppression of the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, they will easily recover from their injuries, and as for the consequences caused by the forbidden art, with the foundation of the Tianhai Sect, they can also recover slowly.

Only this time, the Tianhai Sect lost a lot.

Abrupt.

Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor's expression changed, as if he felt a real great terror, and his face began to distort.

"Not good!"

Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor was shocked.

It seemed like he wanted to get out of the way, but it was too late.

Burst!

A crimson arrow pierced through the void, and an arrow pierced through the head of the Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor, and even shot into the origin of the Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor.

Bang!!!!

The origin of the Secret Immortal Dao Ancestor, which was already badly injured, suddenly exploded, and his entire body began to explode.

The Shenhai Dao Ancestor and Yakumo Dao Ancestor on the side were stunned, looking at this scene incredulously.

They watched as the Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor was exploded by an arrow, but they didn't have time to stop it at all, it was really too secretive, too fast, and too powerful.

What's more, the Secret Immortal Dao Ancestor had cast a forbidden technique before, and the origin was injured, otherwise this arrow could only hurt the Secret Immortal Dao Ancestor.

I saw that the aura of the Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor dissipated, and he completely returned to heaven and earth.

Meanwhile.

Blood rain fell from all parts of the Heaven and Earth in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the Great Dao was crying, and countless powerhouses vaguely felt the sight of a supreme being falling.

The expressions of the Wind King and the Fire King, who had just returned to Black Wind Mountain, changed.

They knew very well what this vision represented, which meant that there was a Supreme Dao Ancestor who had fallen.

"Who fell?"

The two were curious.

The fall of the Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor, the Shenhai Dao Ancestor was terrified in his heart, because his state was similar to that of the Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor, if the arrow just now was not shot at the Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor, but at him, then I am afraid that the person who fell would be him.

"Go back!"

The Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor protected the Shenhai Dao Ancestor and rushed back to the Tianhai Sect as quickly as possible.

Tianhai Sect.

Upon learning of the fall of the Secret Immortal Dao Ancestor, several Ninefold Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Tianhai Sect were furious, and a wisp of consciousness descended, roaring in the void of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

However, they didn't know who shot the arrow, and the timing was too clever.

If the Secret Immortal Dao Ancestor didn't use the forbidden technique, it would be impossible for him to fall this time.

The Heavenly Sea Sect and the other forces were all speculating about who shot that arrow, and it could be the other two Nine Heavens forces, or it could be those Eight Heavens forces.

After all, if other forces had the opportunity to kill an Eightfold Heaven Supreme Dao Ancestor of the Tianhai Sect, they would not let go of the opportunity, but they didn't grasp it, so they didn't make a move.

But this time, the other party was sure to kill a supreme Dao Ancestor, so he made a move.

Therefore, any force has this possibility.

It is even possible that the Heavenly Emperor Palace did it.

But many people feel that there is no need for the Heavenly Emperor Palace to kill a Supreme Dao Ancestor, because the Supreme Dao Ancestor has no threat to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and at present, the Heavenly Emperor Palace has not forbidden their major forces to grow.

If the Forbidden Palace was really born, with their strength, I am afraid that all the treasures would fall into their hands.

Therefore, the possibility of them killing a supreme Dao Ancestor was really not high.

What's more, the three Nine Heavenly Forces were mixed with the Heavenly Emperor Palace before, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace had no reason to deal with the Heavenly Sea Sect!

Of course, everything is speculation, and no one knows what the truth is.

......

Terran.

Ye Tian also came back, he didn't continue to stay in the Forbidden Mountain Range, although there were still some forbidden treasures there, but there were definitely not many.

Besides, he gained too much this time.

This time, there were many True Ancestors who fell in the Forbidden Mountain Range, and even a few Dao Ancestors fell, he took the opportunity to take away the corpses of many True Ancestors and a Dao Ancestor, and also found a lot of forbidden strange things from their bodies, plus the forbidden strange things he obtained, the total number of them added up to about two hundred.

The most important thing is that he has obtained tens of thousands of forbidden Dao stones, which is the biggest gain.

After returning, he came to Ouyang Jiu'er's residence.

At this time, Ouyang Jiu'er had also returned, and when she saw Ye Tian visiting, she came out.

"Jiu'er, ...... just now"

Before Ye Tian could ask, Ouyang Jiu'er took the lead and said, "That's right, it was me just now!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said, "It's too dangerous for you to do that!"

"Danger and gain are the same!" Ouyang Jiu'er smiled slightly, "Besides, I'm sure, otherwise I wouldn't dare to snatch the Forbidden Mother Stone in the hands of many Supreme Dao Ancestors!Wait a minute, I'll give you a small piece of Forbidden Mother Stone, with the assistance of the Forbidden Mother Stone, plus that Forbidden Stone Tablet, he has a very high chance of successfully comprehending the Forbidden Dao! As long as he comprehends a trace of fur, it will have unimaginable benefits to you!"

"This ...... It's too precious!"

Ye Tiandao.

"I'm not embarrassed, but I'll only give you a little, don't give it to anyone else, otherwise if it leaks, it will be a big trouble!

Ouyang Jiu'er reminded.

"Hmm!" Ye Tian nodded.

Ye Tian asked again: "Just now, the Supreme Dao Ancestor fell, what's going on?"

Ouyang Jiu'er waved his hand and said, "This has nothing to do with me, I don't have the strength to kill a supreme Dao ancestor, and the supreme Dao ancestor is almost the same as killing me." I estimate that the fallen person should be one of the two Divine Sea Dao Ancestors and Mi Immortal Dao Ancestors!"

"Who will kill them?"

Ye Tian frowned.

Ouyang Jiu'er guessed: "It is very likely to be the Heavenly Emperor Palace, you should be careful in the future, the Heavenly Emperor Palace has a big plan, although it will not deal with you specifically, but if you block the Heavenly Emperor Palace, they don't mind erasing you!"

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.
